positive: An ethereal, mystical forest animal creature, combining elements of a stylized fox and a deer, standing majestically at the center. The creature has a flowing, voluminous tail of deep sapphire blue and burnt orange, and intricate antlers made of glowing, crystalline gold. It is surrounded by stylized bioluminescent flora and gentle swirling fog. Composition must be a central, clean silhouette against a gradient background of deep indigo and emerald green. Artwork should be highly detailed, suitable for high-quality apparel printing, utilizing bold linework, graphic novel style mixed with Art Nouveau elegance. High contrast, dramatic rim lighting, vector illustration quality, symmetrical and balanced.
negative: blur, noise, grain, low quality, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, debris, bad anatomy, extra limbs, human, photo, realistic, photorealism, dirty, messy
